title: pyrus undulata
intro: Pyrus undulata, also known as the Chinese pear, is a deciduous tree species native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The fruit, leaves, and bark of the tree are used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health, lower cholesterol levels, and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Pyrus undulata include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
